creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Hello Keith,

Sorry for get back to you a bit late. I was on vacation for a week from  
Jan 4th to 9th. I will checking more with this problem when my team is  
finished with get GNOME 2.24 into FreeBSD ports. Give me a few days to get  
back with you. Thanks for locate where the problem is, btw!

Cheers,
Mezz
